    A

    auditLogAspect(ApplicationEventPublisher, SigNozAuditProperties) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.autoconfigure.SigNozAuditAutoConfiguration
     

    C

    CachedBodyRequestWrapper - Class in io.signoz.springboot.web
    HttpServletRequestWrapper that caches the request body so it can be read multiple times (once by the logging filter, once by the actual handler).
    CachedBodyRequestWrapper(HttpServletRequest, int) - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.web.CachedBodyRequestWrapper
     
    CachedBodyResponseWrapper - Class in io.signoz.springboot.web
    HttpServletResponseWrapper that captures the response body so it can be included in the HTTP log entry.
    CachedBodyResponseWrapper(HttpServletResponse) - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.web.CachedBodyResponseWrapper
     
    copyBodyToResponse() - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.web.CachedBodyResponseWrapper
    Flushes buffered writes to the underlying response.

    getReader() - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.web.CachedBodyRequestWrapper
     
    getWriter() - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.web.CachedBodyResponseWrapper
     

    H

    httpLoggingFilter(MaskingRegistry) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.autoconfigure.SigNozWebAutoConfiguration
     
    HttpLoggingFilter - Class in io.signoz.springboot.web
    Logs all inbound HTTP requests and their responses as structured entries.
    HttpLoggingFilter(SigNozWebProperties, MaskingRegistry) - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.web.HttpLoggingFilter

    M

    S

    shouldNotFilter(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.web.HttpLoggingFilter
     
    SigNozAuditAutoConfiguration - Class in io.signoz.springboot.autoconfigure
    Auto-configures audit logging beans: AuditLogAspect and SigNozAuditHandler.
    SigNozAuditAutoConfiguration() - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.autoconfigure.SigNozAuditAutoConfiguration
     
    sigNozAuditHandler() - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.autoconfigure.SigNozAuditAutoConfiguration
     
    SigNozAutoConfiguration - Class in io.signoz.springboot.autoconfigure
    Root auto-configuration entry point for the SigNoz Spring Boot 2.x starter.
    SigNozAutoConfiguration() - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.autoconfigure.SigNozAutoConfiguration
     
    sigNozLogbackConfigurer(MaskingRegistry) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.autoconfigure.SigNozLoggingAutoConfiguration
    SmartInitializingSingleton runs after all beans are created, ensuring the Logback context is fully initialised before we modify it.
    SigNozLoggingAutoConfiguration - Class in io.signoz.springboot.autoconfigure
    Auto-configures the SigNoz logging pipeline: Registers MaskingRegistry with configured masked fields Programmatically attaches OtlpLogbackAppender and/or SigNozJsonEncoder to the root Logback logger based on signoz.logging.mode
    SigNozLoggingAutoConfiguration(SigNozProperties) - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.autoconfigure.SigNozLoggingAutoConfiguration
     
    SigNozMetricsAutoConfiguration - Class in io.signoz.springboot.autoconfigure
    Auto-configures the Micrometer OTLP metrics registry when Micrometer is on the classpath.
    SigNozMetricsAutoConfiguration() - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.autoconfigure.SigNozMetricsAutoConfiguration
     
    sigNozMetricsConfig(SigNozProperties) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.autoconfigure.SigNozMetricsAutoConfiguration
     
    sigNozTracer(OpenTelemetry) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.autoconfigure.SigNozTracingAutoConfiguration
     
    SigNozTracingAutoConfiguration - Class in io.signoz.springboot.autoconfigure
    Auto-configures OpenTelemetry tracing beans: OpenTelemetrySdkConfig, SigNozTracer, TracedAspect.
    SigNozTracingAutoConfiguration() - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.autoconfigure.SigNozTracingAutoConfiguration
     
    SigNozWebAutoConfiguration - Class in io.signoz.springboot.autoconfigure
    Auto-configures web-layer beans for Spring Boot 2.x (javax.servlet): TraceIdMdcFilter — injects trace IDs into MDC HttpLoggingFilter — logs HTTP request/response pairs MaskedArgumentAspect — masks @Masked method parameters
    SigNozWebAutoConfiguration(SigNozProperties) - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.autoconfigure.SigNozWebAutoConfiguration
     

    T

    tracedAspect(SigNozTracer) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.autoconfigure.SigNozTracingAutoConfiguration
     
    traceIdMdcFilter() - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.autoconfigure.SigNozWebAutoConfiguration
     
    TraceIdMdcFilter - Class in io.signoz.springboot.web
    Servlet filter that extracts the active OpenTelemetry trace/span IDs and injects them into the SLF4J MDC for the duration of each HTTP request.
    TraceIdMdcFilter() - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.web.TraceIdMdcFilter
